messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] URGENT:having problem in glmReserve
messages.body_plain:
Hi Danish,

Please provide reproducible data and code so that we can help you.
See: http://stackoverflow.com/questions/5963269/how-to-make-a-great-r-reproducible-example 

Thanks

Markus

On 27 May 2014, at 17:32, Syed Danish Ali <sd.ali90 at ymail.com> wrote:

> Dear All
> 
> I am converting my data frame into class of triangles using as(triangle name csv file, "triangles") and by running class code it is conforming that triangle is now of the class 'triangles'
> 
> Even then when i run glmReserve it gives the error : triangle must be of class 'triangle'.
> 
> Kindly help me as soon as possible.
> 
> Regards
> Danish
> 	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
> 
> _______________________________________________
> R-SIG-insurance mailing list
> R-SIG-insurance at r-project.org
> https://stat.ethz.ch/mailman/listinfo/r-sig-insurance
messages.body_snippet:
Hi Danish,

See: http://stackoverflow.com/questions/5963269/how-to-make-a-great-r-reproducible-example
